response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of full-stack experience well beyond the 6+ requirement, with recent hands-on work in TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, and AI-agent/MCP tooling that maps directly to the role's primary stack and AI requirement. Background includes TDD/CI-CD craftsmanship, multi-language fluency (TS, Java, Python-adjacent via DLang/C++), and founder-level ownership of a Kubernetes-deployed platform. Gaps around Nest.js, Vitest, and Kotlin specifically are minor given the demonstrated breadth and adaptability.
strengths: Deep full-stack experience with TypeScript/Node/React/MongoDB plus recent AI-agent and MCP tooling work
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, Docker/Kubernetes
Polyglot background (TS, Java, C/C++, DLang) and proven architecture/ownership via GISCollective
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed (uses adjacent frameworks/tools)
Kotlin not mentioned; Java experience is older (pre-2018)
Located in Lagos, Nigeria — potential time-zone/relocation alignment with Berlin-centric teams unclear
